```python
import requests

# 获取会议记录列表
notes_list_resp = requests.post("http://localhost:48371/notes/list", json={"max_results": 20})
notes = notes_list_resp.json().get("notes", [])

# 查找2026年2月23日的会议记录
target_note = None
for note in notes:
    if "2026" in note.get("title", "") and ("2月" in note.get("title", "") or "23" in note.get("title", "")):
        target_note = note
        break

print("会议列表:", notes)
print("目标记录:", target_note)
